text: Papa ne aaj sabke samne announce kar diya ki mere bacchon ko ab boarding school bheja jayega taaki khandaan ki izzat par koi sawal na uthaye. Mummy ne turant rona shuru kiya aur boli ki meri 'manhoosiyat' ki wajah se unka BP badh gaya hai aur sab meri wajah se ho raha hai. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki is ghutan mein saans kaise loon.

Bina mujhse pooche papa ne meri doosri shaadi ka rishta pakka kar diya hai kyunki unhe lagta hai ki ek talaqshuda beti ghar par bojh hai. Mummy baar-baar bol rahi hain ki meri zidd unhe shamshaan pahuncha degi aur unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main kuch soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas rone se gala bhara hua hai aur future andhera lag raha hai.

Papa ne aaj announce kiya ki main ab se kisi bhi family function mein nahi jaungi kyunki 'log kya kahenge' ki ek akeli aurat ghoom rahi hai. Mummy ne seene pe haath rakh kar bol diya ki meri wajah se unhe roz padosiyon ki baatein sunni padti hain aur unka sukh-chain chheen gaya hai. Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas flood of emotions mein doobi hui hoon aur lag raha hai ki dimaag phat jayega.

Bina meri marzi ke papa ne meri job chhudwane ka faisla kar liya hai kyunki unhe lagta hai ki bahar nikalne se meri badnaami ho rahi hai. Mummy ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri wajah se unhe roz papa ki jhidkiyan sunni padti hain aur unka BP high ho gaya hai. Mujhe itna gussa aur helplessness mehsus ho raha hai ki main kuch soch nahi pa rahi, bas akele baith kar rona nikal raha hai.

Aaj khane par papa ne bol diya ki meri salary ka sara paisa ab joint family ke kharche mein jayega aur mere bacchon ke liye main kuch save nahi kar sakti. Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur agar maine protest kiya toh wo zeher kha lengi kyunki unka sar samaj mein neecha ho gaya hai. Main poori tarah se toot gayi hoon, bas rona hi aa raha hai aur dimaag ekdum blank hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha.
